This game is really fun! It has so much to do and has many maps. Although there is some holes in the wall like in canyons there is a big hole that leads to outside of the map as well in EMC. Monsters get stuck sometimes that also needs to be fixed. But overall this game is extremely fun! Couple more things, public lobbies have no one but the code 2 always has 20 people on it. Also please optimize the servers my game is really laggy when I play on pretty full lobbies. My favorite monsters are, Jolly Rancher, Pixel, Toxic Gunner, Void, A Train, the rainbow caterpillar, Baja Blast, And Raven in valley

reviews.review_title: This game is better than i expected
reviews.review_description: I thought this game would be just another laggy and not so scary remake of gtag... BUT its not, its actually very fun w/ friends and terrifyingly scary alone. Public lobbies work too and i was kinda surprised. All in all, this game is very fun to play and it doesn't really use gtag models alot.

developer_response.body:
Hi, thanks for your feedback.

We want to clarify a couple of things. Our game has no in-app purchases, so there’s nothing in it designed to be greedy. We also make sure to credit the original CGH where it’s due—we’re not trying to take ownership of anyone else’s work.

If you have specific concerns, feel free to share more details. We’re always open to constructive feedback.

– Stroke
